description: Address 3 non-blocking improvements from v2 semantic review: fix doc-code drift for synthesis max_active, strengthen test assertion, add two tests for untested strategy branches.
steps: Step 1: Update Virtual_SIA_Current_Regime_Status_AR.md to reflect synthesis max_active=2 (fix all instances)
Step 2: Strengthen test_select_applicable_concepts_respects_max_active to assert == 1 instead of <=
findings: All 15 tests pass. Doc updated in 4 places (code block, rationale table, section 3.1, summary table). The strengthened assertion passes because both comparison concepts have enough token overlap (family_fit=2 + semantic_fit >= 5 = score >= 7) so at least one is always selected. The secondary admission test works because both synthesis concepts share many tokens with the task text. The high-threshold fallback test works because the procedure concept has ~10 shared tokens with the task text.
